macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: U.S. Labor Market Surprises with 254K Jobs Added, Unemployment Dips to 4.1%
items.summary: Employers added a robust 254,000 jobs in September, far exceeding forecasts of 150,000, while unemployment fell to 4.1%, signaling a still-sturdy labor market that may influence Fed policy.

items.title: U.S. Stocks Rebound After Hong Kong Markets Hit Worst Day Since 2008
items.summary: Wall Street rebounded following a sharp drop in Hong Kong stocks, with falling oil prices helping ease market pressure after earlier declines.

items.title: Dow Rallies to Record High Following Blockbuster Jobs Report
items.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average reached a record after a surprisingly strong U.S. jobs report boosted optimism about economic resilience.

items.title: Germany's Economy Expected to Shrink for Second Consecutive Year
items.summary: Germany's government confirmed its economy is on track to contract again this year, marking a second straight year of decline amid ongoing global economic challenges.

items.title: Inflation Downtrend Likely to Continue as Benign Reading Expected
items.summary: New economic data is expected to show a continued decline in inflation, with analysts forecasting a benign reading that could support future Fed rate decisions.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto market sees $367M in liquidations as BTC and ETH slide
items.summary: Coinglass data reported $367 million in crypto liquidations over 24 hours, with long positions making up most of the wipeout. Bitcoin and Ethereum accounted for the largest shares, and BTC briefly fell below $63,000 while ETH slipped under $1,700.

items.title: Crypto futures liquidations reach about $490M amid broad selloff
items.summary: CryptoRank reported roughly $490 million in 24-hour liquidations across major centralized exchanges, led by Bitcoin and Ethereum. The move reflected a sharp risk-off shift across leveraged crypto markets.

items.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum weaken as crypto market extends downturn
items.summary: FXPro News said the total crypto market cap fell to about $2.16 trillion, with Bitcoin trading mostly below $63,000 and Ethereum failing to reclaim key support. The article also noted bearish on-chain signals and continued fragility in market structure.

items.title: Strategy liquidation fears weigh on crypto sentiment
items.summary: A market report cited concerns that Strategy may need to sell Bitcoin or issue additional shares to support its STRC preferred stock, adding to downside pressure. The same report highlighted ETF outflows and a large options expiry as additional volatility drivers.

items.title: Binance Square cites $180M in liquidations over 24 hours
items.summary: Binance Square reposted Coinglass data showing $180 million in crypto derivatives liquidations over the past day. This reinforces the broader theme of leveraged positions being unwound across the market.

items.title: Monero developers warn of active vulnerability in P2Pool mining software
items.summary: FXPro News reported that Monero developers warned miners about an exploit affecting the decentralized P2Pool mining pool. The warning said attackers are already exploiting the flaw and urged participants to update immediately.

items.title: Bhutan moves 533 BTC to Binance
items.summary: Arkham Intelligence, as cited by FXPro News, said Bhutan transferred 533 bitcoins worth about $34.5 million to Binance. The report noted the kingdom’s publicly tracked BTC balance has fallen sharply from its 2024 peak.

items.title: CZ calls for stock markets to move onto blockchain
items.summary: Changpeng Zhao urged countries to migrate stock markets to blockchain infrastructure and issue state-backed stablecoins. The comments were framed as a broader argument for tokenization and market accessibility.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
